description: CompositionRed T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironIf your little one is a foodie, then this t-shirt from tantra is a perfect buy. The graphic print on the chest oozes cheeky attitude. dress your young one in this T-shirt, pair it with jeans and canvas shoes, and go out for a sloppy dinner treat.
